sanskrit:
चेतसा सर्वकर्माणि मयि संन्यस्य मत्परः।
बुद्धियोगमुपाश्रित्य मच्चित्तः सततं भव॥
transliteration:
cetasā sarva-karmāṇi mayi saṃnyasya mat-paraḥ |
buddhi-yogam upāśritya mac-cittaḥ satataṃ bhava ||
literal_meaning: By the mind / all actions / in Me / having renounced / having Me as the supreme goal / taking refuge in the yoga of intelligence / with the mind fixed on Me / always / be.
contextual_meaning: Shift the locus of control from ego to an internalized benevolent presence; let every action be mediated by a higher-order value system rather than personal gain.
psychological_state: Secure-functioning mode: reduced amygdala reactivity, increased coherence between intention and action, sense of being 'held' by an internalized compassionate figure.
trigger_scenario: A project manager drowning in stakeholder demands mentally hands over the outcome to a mentor’s voice: 'Do your best, release the rest.'
anchor_text: Let every thought and deed be offered to the inner guide, not for self.
